lines.speaker: Pennant
lines.text: Hello! What can I do for ya' today?

lines.speaker: Pennant
lines.text: Well, you can grow a crystal tree, if you've got the right kind of seed. Great for getting a few shards out of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And where do you get the right kind of seed?

lines.speaker: Pennant
lines.text: They're pretty hard to come by... But I might be able to exchange some, for any other kinds of crystal seed you might have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually... I don't think I've got any crystal seeds to trade, right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I trade you for some crystal acorns?

lines.speaker: Pennant
lines.text: What kind of crystal seeds do you have to offer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually... I don't think I've got any crystal seeds to trade, right now.
